rows.question: What is the data scope for role system_admin?
Which collections can role system_admin access?
Which field restrictions apply to role system_admin?
What policy summary applies to role system_admin?
rows.answer: Full platform configuration; destructive actions require explicit confirmation and audit.

roles.policy_summary: Full platform configuration; destructive actions require explicit confirmation and audit.

rows.question: What is the data scope for role finverse_admin?
Which collections can role finverse_admin access?
Which field restrictions apply to role finverse_admin?
What policy summary applies to role finverse_admin?
rows.answer: Can configure olympiads, slots, materials, approvals; cannot bypass audit.

roles.policy_summary: Can configure olympiads, slots, materials, approvals; cannot bypass audit.

rows.question: What is the data scope for role sales_staff?
Which collections can role sales_staff access?
Which field restrictions apply to role sales_staff?
rows.answer: no student marks, no payment internals

rows.question: What policy summary applies to role sales_staff?

roles.field_restrictions: no student marks, no payment internals

rows.question: What is the data scope for role finance_staff?
Which collections can role finance_staff access?
rows.answer: payments, participations payment fields, schools billing fields

rows.question: Which field restrictions apply to role finance_staff?
What policy summary applies to role finance_staff?

roles.collection_access: payments, participations payment fields, schools billing fields

rows.question: What is the data scope for role operations_staff?
Which collections can role operations_staff access?
rows.answer: exam_slots, exam_materials, courier_batches, participations logistics fields

rows.question: Which field restrictions apply to role operations_staff?
rows.answer: no payment reversal, no ranking approval

rows.question: What policy summary applies to role operations_staff?
rows.answer: Can manage exam logistics and file release after payment gate.

roles.collection_access: exam_slots, exam_materials, courier_batches, participations logistics fields
roles.field_restrictions: no payment reversal, no ranking approval
roles.policy_summary: Can manage exam logistics and file release after payment gate.

rows.question: What is the data scope for role evaluator?
Which collections can role evaluator access?
rows.answer: courier_batches assigned, omr_imports, results draft fields

rows.question: Which field restrictions apply to role evaluator?
rows.answer: no parent contact, no payment data

rows.question: What policy summary applies to role evaluator?
rows.answer: Can import/review scores but cannot publish.

roles.collection_access: courier_batches assigned, omr_imports, results draft fields
roles.field_restrictions: no parent contact, no payment data
roles.policy_summary: Can import/review scores but cannot publish.

rows.question: What is the data scope for role results_approver?
Which collections can role results_approver access?
rows.answer: results, certificates, students minimal identity, schools

rows.question: Which field restrictions apply to role results_approver?
What policy summary applies to role results_approver?
rows.answer: Can approve/publish results and certificates after checks.

roles.collection_access: results, certificates, students minimal identity, schools
roles.policy_summary: Can approve/publish results and certificates after checks.

rows.question: What is the data scope for role school_coordinator?
Which collections can role school_coordinator access?
rows.answer: own school, own participation, own students, own files, own results/certificates

rows.question: Which field restrictions apply to role school_coordinator?
rows.answer: internal notes, other schools, finance internals, evaluation notes

rows.question: What policy summary applies to role school_coordinator?
rows.answer: Can upload students, book slots, download own materials, submit courier, view own results.

roles.collection_access: own school, own participation, own students, own files, own results/certificates
roles.field_restrictions: internal notes, other schools, finance internals, evaluation notes
roles.policy_summary: Can upload students, book slots, download own materials, submit courier, view own results.

permission_rules.question: Should public role access private collections?
permission_rules.answer: No. Public role has no access to schools, students, payments, files, results, or certificates except limited certificate verification endpoint.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Should school coordinator access be item-level filtered?
permission_rules.answer: Yes. Every school coordinator query must be filtered by own school_id.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can school coordinator export students?
permission_rules.answer: Yes, own school only, excluding internal notes and evaluation fields.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can school coordinator delete students?
permission_rules.answer: No after final count; before final count deletion may be replaced by mark inactive if needed.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can evaluator see parent contact?
permission_rules.answer: No. Evaluators see candidate ID, school code, answer sheet number, score fields, and exception notes only.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can finance staff manually mark paid?
permission_rules.answer: Yes, only with evidence fields and audit log.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can finance staff reverse payment?
permission_rules.answer: Yes, with reason, evidence and audit; system admin also allowed.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can operations release exam materials before payment?
permission_rules.answer: No. Server-side gate requires paid or manually confirmed payment status.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can results be published by evaluator?
permission_rules.answer: No. Only results_approver or finverse_admin can publish after review status.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Can certificates be public?
permission_rules.answer: Certificate files are private; public verification returns limited metadata only.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Is MFA required for admins?
permission_rules.answer: Yes for system_admin and finverse_admin where Directus/identity configuration supports it.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

permission_rules.question: Are destructive actions allowed by default?
permission_rules.answer: No. Delete permissions disabled except system_admin with explicit approval; prefer archive/status fields.
permission_rules.build_instruction: Implement as Directus permission, server route guard, and test.
permission_rules.test_instruction: Run negative and positive permission tests.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Default access policy' is required?
security_controls.answer: Deny by default for all collections, files, APIs and routes unless explicitly granted.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control deny_by_default: Deny by default for all collections, files, APIs and routes unless explicitly granted.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Admin MFA' is required?
security_controls.answer: Require MFA for system_admin and finverse_admin where identity provider/Directus supports it.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control admin_mfa: Require MFA for system_admin and finverse_admin where identity provider/Directus supports it.

security_controls.question: What security control 'School-level isolation' is required?
security_controls.answer: Every school-facing query and mutation must derive school_id from authenticated session, not browser input.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control school_isolation: Every school-facing query and mutation must derive school_id from authenticated session, not browser input.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Field-level restrictions' is required?
security_controls.answer: Hide parent contact, payment internals, evaluation notes and internal notes from roles that do not need them.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control field_level_permissions: Hide parent contact, payment internals, evaluation notes and internal notes from roles that do not need them.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Private files by default' is required?
security_controls.answer: All files are private unless explicitly whitelisted for public certificate verification metadata.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control private_files_default: All files are private unless explicitly whitelisted for public certificate verification metadata.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Controlled downloads' is required?
security_controls.answer: Downloads must pass through server-side permission check and log audit event; use signed/streamed access.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control signed_downloads: Downloads must pass through server-side permission check and log audit event; use signed/streamed access.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Webhook signature verification' is required?
security_controls.answer: Razorpay webhook must verify signature before updating payment records.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control webhook_signature: Razorpay webhook must verify signature before updating payment records.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Webhook idempotency' is required?
security_controls.answer: Duplicate webhook/event must not double-update payment or generate duplicate audit side effects.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control webhook_idempotency: Duplicate webhook/event must not double-update payment or generate duplicate audit side effects.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Rate limiting' is required?
security_controls.answer: Rate limit login, public verification, uploads, webhook endpoints and expensive export/download endpoints.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control rate_limiting: Rate limit login, public verification, uploads, webhook endpoints and expensive export/download endpoints.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Input validation' is required?
security_controls.answer: Validate all server inputs using schema validation; never trust client-side validation alone.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control input_validation: Validate all server inputs using schema validation; never trust client-side validation alone.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Upload validation' is required?
security_controls.answer: Validate file type, size, extension, MIME, and expected parser format before processing.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control upload_validation: Validate file type, size, extension, MIME, and expected parser format before processing.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Secrets protection' is required?
security_controls.answer: No secrets in browser, GitHub, logs, CSV, screenshots or generated documentation; .env.example uses placeholders only.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control secrets_policy: No secrets in browser, GitHub, logs, CSV, screenshots or generated documentation; .env.example uses placeholders only.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Safe error messages' is required?
security_controls.answer: User-facing errors must be clear but not reveal internal table names, tokens, stack traces, SQL/API details.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control error_safety: User-facing errors must be clear but not reveal internal table names, tokens, stack traces, SQL/API details.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Audit critical actions' is required?
security_controls.answer: Audit login failures, role changes, payment updates, manual overrides, result changes, file downloads, certificate actions.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control audit_required: Audit login failures, role changes, payment updates, manual overrides, result changes, file downloads, certificate actions.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Least privilege roles' is required?
security_controls.answer: Each role only receives permissions required for its workflow; delete disabled by default.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control least_privilege: Each role only receives permissions required for its workflow; delete disabled by default.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Session timeout' is required?
security_controls.answer: Use reasonable session timeout; require re-authentication for high-risk admin/payment actions if possible.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control session_timeout: Use reasonable session timeout; require re-authentication for high-risk admin/payment actions if possible.

security_controls.question: What security control 'CSRF protection' is required?
security_controls.answer: Protect mutating routes using same-site cookies/CSRF tokens or framework equivalent.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control csrf_protection: Protect mutating routes using same-site cookies/CSRF tokens or framework equivalent.

security_controls.question: What security control 'CORS restriction' is required?
security_controls.answer: Restrict API/CORS origins to approved portal domains in production.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control cors_restriction: Restrict API/CORS origins to approved portal domains in production.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Security headers' is required?
security_controls.answer: Add CSP, X-Frame-Options/frame-ancestors, Referrer-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options and HSTS where supported.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control security_headers: Add CSP, X-Frame-Options/frame-ancestors, Referrer-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options and HSTS where supported.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Dependency security' is required?
security_controls.answer: Run npm audit or equivalent dependency checks; avoid abandoned packages for auth/payments/files.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control dependency_scanning: Run npm audit or equivalent dependency checks; avoid abandoned packages for auth/payments/files.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Log redaction' is required?
security_controls.answer: Mask tokens, passwords, parent contacts, payment references where not needed, and webhook raw secrets.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control logging_redaction: Mask tokens, passwords, parent contacts, payment references where not needed, and webhook raw secrets.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Backup access control' is required?
security_controls.answer: Backups restricted to system_admin; backup downloads logged; encrypted where available.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control backup_access: Backups restricted to system_admin; backup downloads logged; encrypted where available.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Staging data safety' is required?
security_controls.answer: No real student/parent data in staging unless anonymised and approved.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control staging_data: No real student/parent data in staging unless anonymised and approved.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Delete protection' is required?
security_controls.answer: Prefer archive/revoke/status over hard delete; destructive deletes require system_admin and audit.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control delete_policy: Prefer archive/revoke/status over hard delete; destructive deletes require system_admin and audit.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Public verification minimisation' is required?
security_controls.answer: Public certificate verification returns only approved fields and is rate-limited.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control public_verification_limit: Public certificate verification returns only approved fields and is rate-limited.

security_controls.question: What security control 'MCP builder account' is required?
security_controls.answer: Directus MCP/agent builder uses dedicated account, limited time, no personal admin token, delete disabled where possible.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control admin_builder_account: Directus MCP/agent builder uses dedicated account, limited time, no personal admin token, delete disabled where possible.

security_controls.question: What security control 'Security review gate' is required?
security_controls.answer: Any permission, payment, student data, file access, public endpoint or schema change requires security review row/change ticket.
security_controls.build_instruction: Implement security control change_review_gate: Any permission, payment, student data, file access, public endpoint or schema change requires security review row/change ticket.
